form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.89) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when he got back too far over 300m at Taree Super Track. Prior to that won by a neck at Taree Super Track (17.57) beating Tangles Tippett in a Grade 4/5 on April 1. Broke a four-start winning streak when eighth last time. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 19.56 with a 1.75 lengths win at this track over 340m. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Stay with her.
